basic_details.job_title: IIT(ISM) Dhanbad Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology (ISM) Dhanbad (IIT(ISM) Dhanbad) Research Associate Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIT(ISM) Dhanbad. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT(ISM) Dhanbad Research Associate Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD in Earth Science with at least one research paper in SCI Journal. Master's degree in Applied Geophysics/Geology/Geoinformatics from a reputed institute with 60% or equivalent CGPA
qualification.details: PhD in Earth Science with at least one research paper in SCI Journal. Master's degree in Applied Geophysics/Geology/Geoinformatics from a reputed institute with 60% or equivalent CGPA.

salary_details.details: Rs. 61,000/- plus HRA (1st year) Rs. 67,000/- plus HRA (2nd year)

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 06-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

IIT(ISM) Dhanbad Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 06-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT(ISM) Dhanbad Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Research Associate position at IIT(ISM) Dhanbad?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Research Associate position at IIT(ISM) Dhanbad is 06-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PhD in Earth Science with at least one research paper in an SCI Journal. Additionally, a Master's degree in Applied Geophysics/Geology/Geoinformatics from a reputed institute with 60% or equivalent CGPA is required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Research Associate position is Rs. 61,000/- plus HRA for the first year and Rs. 67,000/- plus HRA for the second year.

faq.question: Q4. How can candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply by sending their complete application along with required documents via email to the address specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Research Associate at IIT(ISM) Dhanbad.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Associate position will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided in this article. It contains all the detailed information.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The Research Associate position at IIT(ISM) Dhanbad is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q10. Does IIT(ISM) Dhanbad offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Please refer to the official notification for details regarding age limits and any applicable age relaxation for reserved categories.
